args.subject: Action required: Start initial project phase — deadline 2024-05-20
args.body:
Hi David,

Please coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the new project. Specifically:
- Confirm which developers will be assigned and their availability.
- Define the first sprint’s scope (key deliverables and acceptance criteria).
- Schedule a kickoff meeting with the development team and send an invite.

Deadline to complete these items and confirm the start date: 2024-05-20.

Please reply to confirm you’ve started and share the kickoff meeting time once scheduled.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required: Send meeting agenda to John Mitchell — deadline 2024-05-21
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Please email the file "meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx" to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review. When you send it, include a one-line note requesting any comments or required changes and ask for an expected turnaround date.

Deadline to send the email and confirm receipt/expected turnaround: 2024-05-21.

Please reply once the email has been sent and include a copy of the message you sent (or a screenshot) for records.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required: Review sales projections & provide feedback — deadline 2024-05-19
args.body:
Hi Mark,

Please review the sales projections document and provide detailed feedback. Specifically:
- Identify any assumptions that need verification.
- Highlight areas where projections differ materially from past trends and explain why.
- Recommend actions or adjustments to improve projection accuracy.

Deadline to submit your feedback (written notes or annotated document): 2024-05-19.

Please reply with your feedback or if you need additional data to complete the review.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
